title: Sakeva Optimized
description: A high-performance modpack that is perfect for users with a weak PCs.
body:
![Sakeva Optimized](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec1e9cb46bacf82ffe22c2ccb918ec3058e2a09f.png) 
**Introducing Sakeva Optimized!**

A simple and lightweight modpack, assembled from both the best optimizing mods tuned for performance, as well as quality-of-life mods and resource packs. It is perfect for users with a weak PC.

Initially, the modpack was created for full immersion on the server [Sakeva](https://discord.com/invite/sakeva), but it is also suitable for playing on other servers and for a single-player world!

There are already such popular mods inside that are used on many servers, such as Plasmo Voice for communication between players and EmoteCraft with an emotion pack for better interaction with them!

There are also several resource packs and shaders that you will definitely keep!

The modpack is based on the Fabric mod loader, which is lightweight, fast and supports many mods. You can use it as a base to add your other mods.
